name: Madhur Jaffrey's Chana Dal
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups chana dal or yellow split peas, picked over, washed
1 clove garlic, peeled and chopped (up to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the dal in a heavy pot along with the water. Bring to a boil and remove any surface scum.
2. Add the turmeric and ginger. Cover, leaving the lid just slightly ajar, turn the heat to low, and simmer gently for one and a half hours or until the dal is tender. Stir every 5 minutes or so during the last half hour of cooking to prevent sticking.
3. Remove the ginger slices.
4. Add the salt and garam masala to the dal. Stir to mix.
5. Heat the ghee in a small frying pan over medium heat. When hot, put in the cumin seeds. A couple of seconds later, put in the garlic. Stir and fry until the garlic pieces are lightly browned.
6. Put the chili powder into the pan. Immediately lift the pan off the heat and pour the mixture into the pot with the dal. Stir to mix.
